mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Point(user_id, amount, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{userId}, 0, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id = user_id
mapper.update: UPDATE Point SET amount = COALESCE(amount, 0) + #{delta}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(amount, 0) FROM Point WHERE user_id = #{userId}
